subcodes.first_line: O thou verdant, flourishing and wondrous leaf, render thanks unto God, for He hath caused thee to bring forth perfect fruit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایتها الورقه الخضله النضره البدیعه اشکری الله بما انبتک من الثمره الکامله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement
